title: SmallCaps
description: Type small caps letters right within your game.
body:
**SmallCaps** is a handy utility plugin that lets you rename items and edit their lores right in-game with a simple command. No need to hunt down websites to convert text to small caps—this plugin saves you time and makes the whole process easier!

### Commands
- **/scitem <rename|lore> <args>** - Use this to rename items or change their lores 
- **/scconvert** - This command converts items to small caps, including the title, lore, color, and formatting!

### Permissions
- smallcaps.scitem
- smallcaps.scconvert

## PLACEHOLDER SUPPORT
[PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/) is required for placeholders to work. Placeholders works nearly anywhere. Example:

```
%smallcaps_this_is_a_placeholder%
```

![PlaceHolder example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba7ee39e877c6d92493583a3b02e23f17240398a.png)

**_If you like this free plugin, please leave a review!
It will mean a lot to me._**
